@@ -62,1 +62,1 @@

+		<jetty.version>12.1.4</jetty.version>
@@ -124,0 +124,4 @@
+								<!-- Jetty 12.1.x ships the high-level WebSocket server API
+									(WebSocketUpgradeHandler, ServerWebSocketContainer,
+									WebSocketCreator) in a package that the bundle does NOT
+									list under Export-Package. Re-bnd to expose it. -->
@@ -126,6 +130,10 @@
-								</artifact>
-								<artifact>
-									<id>org.eclipse.jetty.ee9:jetty-ee9-servlet:${jetty.version}</id>
-								</artifact>
-								<artifact>
-									<id>org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket:jetty-ee9-websocket-servlet:${jetty.version}</id>
+									<override>true</override>
+									<instructions>
+										<Bundle-SymbolicName>org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.server</Bundle-SymbolicName>
+										<Export-Package>org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.server.*</Export-Package>
+										<!-- p2-maven-plugin's bundled bnd defaults Import-Package to
+											resolution:=optional, which causes NoClassDefFoundError at
+											runtime. List the jetty packages explicitly so they are
+											mandatory. Let bnd auto-derive everything else via *. -->
+										<Import-Package>org.eclipse.jetty.http,org.eclipse.jetty.http.pathmap,org.eclipse.jetty.server,org.eclipse.jetty.server.handler,org.eclipse.jetty.util,org.eclipse.jetty.util.component,org.eclipse.jetty.util.thread,org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.api,org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.common,org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.core,org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.core.exception,org.eclipse.jetty.websocket.core.server,*</Import-Package>
+									</instructions>
@@ -136,6 +144,0 @@
-								<artifact>
-									<id>org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket:jetty-ee9-websocket-jetty-api:${jetty.version}</id>
-								</artifact>
-								<artifact>
-									<id>org.eclipse.jetty.ee9.websocket:jetty-ee9-websocket-jetty-server:${jetty.version}</id>
-								</artifact>
